title: Bacillus cereus proteomics, intraproteome
projectDescription: This project contributes to the proteomic comparison of Bacillus cereus ATCC 14579 wild-type strain without its pBClin15 plasmid, its mutant strain devoided of the methionine sulfoxide reductase AB (msrAB) protein and the corresponding msrAB complemented strain, all strains grown in aerobiosis condition and harvested at three growth stages.
sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein samples were loaded on a SDS-PAGE, sliced into polyacrylamide bands, digested by trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed by LTQ-Orbitrap XL tandem mass spectrometry.
dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT, the results were then parsed with IRMA, spectral counts were compared using R package LIMMA.
keywords: Shotgun proteomics; intraproteome; methionine sulfoxide reductase ab
